title: Private remedy
doc_html:
§994.  Private remedy

No provision of this Part shall be construed to be a bar to any civil action by a private party against any person for the violation of R.S. 23:992.

Added by Acts 1979, No. 534, §1.
doc_text:
§994.  Private remedy
No provision of this Part shall be construed to be a bar to any civil action by a private party against any person for the violation of R.S. 23:992.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 534, §1.
